name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America Orange Park, Florida — Advance America offers payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans (up to $1,000), and title loans (up to $25,000...
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized, fully accredited lender specializing in short-term emergency cash solutions. The company has been serving customers across multiple states, including Florida, and operates physical storefronts alongside an online lending platform. Their Jacksonville location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. is positioned in the Commonwealth Village area, accessible from downtown and between major highways.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100–$500) for short-term needs with 2–4 week repayment terms; Installment Loans ($100–$1,000) allowing repayment over multiple payments; and Title Loans ($2,000–$25,000 online) secured by vehicle collateral. Title loans are offered in partnership with LoanCenter. All products are available both online and in-store, with same-day or rapid funding. The company also provides Western Union services and claims to serve millions of customers seeking quick cash access.

Advance America emphasizes accessibility through bilingual staff ("Hablamos español"), extended store hours (9 AM–6 PM weekdays, 9 AM–4 PM Saturday), and streamlined application processes requiring government ID, proof of income, checking account, and Social Security Number/ITIN. The company highlights a 4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 125,456 reviews, with customer testimonials praising staff helpfulness and loan processing speed. Marketing emphasizes "first-rate customer service" and being "one of the most trusted places" for emergency cash.

While Advance America provides genuine convenience for consumers facing immediate cash needs, the products carry inherent risks typical of short-term lending: high effective APRs, short repayment windows, and potential debt cycles. The company does not disclose APR, fees, or specific terms on the landing page, requiring customers to contact the store or apply to learn actual costs. For consumers without traditional banking access or credit options, these loans solve immediate problems but should be approached as genuinely short-term solutions rather than sustainable financing.
address: 950 Blanding Blvd Suite 2, Orange Park, FL 32065

company_info.headquarters: 950 Blanding Blvd Suite 2, Orange Park, FL 32065

pros: Same-day or next-day funding available both online and in-store
High loan amounts for title loans ($2,000–$25,000) based on vehicle value
Installment loans offer larger amounts ($1,000) and longer repayment terms than payday loans
Bilingual staff and customer support (Spanish-language services available)
Extended store hours including Saturday morning service (9 AM–4 PM)
4.9/5 star rating based on 125,456 verified customer reviews
Multiple loan products to match different financial scenarios and timelines
cons: APR, fees, and exact terms not disclosed on website; customers must apply or call to learn costs
Short repayment windows (2–4 weeks for payday loans) create high risk of debt cycle
Title loans require vehicle as collateral, risking repossession if unable to repay
No mention of credit-building benefits, financial counseling, or alternatives to debt
Typical of emergency lenders: high effective APRs and predatory lending risks despite customer satisfaction
best_for: Workers facing urgent cash shortfalls between paychecks with stable employment and checking account access
Borrowers with vehicle equity seeking larger lump sums ($2,000–$25,000) on tight timelines
Unbanked or underbanked consumers without access to traditional credit lines or emergency savings
Bilingual Spanish speakers preferring in-person service with staff able to explain loan terms clearly
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed or self-employed individuals with immediate cash needs, stable income, and a vehicle (for title loans), who can repay within weeks and lack access to traditional credit. The main caveat is that APRs and fees are undisclosed on the website, and the short repayment cycles carry genuine risk of debt entrapment—these loans solve today's emergency but should never be relied upon as ongoing financing.
services: Payday loans online or in-store ($100–$500, 2–4 week terms)
Installment loans online or in-store ($100–$1,000, multiple payment schedule)
Phone pre-qualification for payday and installment loans
Store locator and branch finder across Florida and multiple states
Referral reward program for new borrower originations

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
